case_title: RAUL MARTINEZ et al VS. WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO WELLS

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-01-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR - NOTICE OF REMOVAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO WELLS DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS TRANSFERRED TO DEPARTMENT 501, THE REAL PROPERTY COURT, TO BE HEARD ON AUGUST 30, 2013 AT 9:30 AM. (SEE SFLR 8.10.) DEFENDANTS SHALL PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE COMPLAINT TO DEPARTMENT 501, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JULY 31, 2013. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO CSR#7489.

calendar.matters:
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-27-2013 Off Calendar

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-31-2013 Continued To Aug-30-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. SUCCESSOR BY MERGER TO WELLS DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS Transferred to Department 501, the Real Property Court, to be heard on August 30, 2013 at 9:30 am. (See SFLR 8.10.) Defendants shall provide courtesy copies of the Complaint to Department 501, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than July 31, 2013. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Melanie Gheno CSR#7489.
